summary: Tested 'Os meus filhos' section with 3 tabs feature. All 10 features working correctly: 3 tabs exist, children tab only visible for 'responsavel' role, child selector shows avatar/name/teams count, multiple children displayed and selectable, clicking child filters teams, team cards show correct badges and info, club card shows correct info, backend endpoints work correctly, non-guardian users get 403.

3_tabs_exist.description: 3 tabs exist: 'As minhas equipas', 'Os meus clubes', 'Os meus filhos'
3_tabs_exist.verified: All 3 tabs visible with correct data-testids: tab-my-teams, tab-my-clubs, tab-my-children

children_tab_only_for_responsavel.description: Children tab only visible for 'responsavel' role users
children_tab_only_for_responsavel.verified: Admin user sees only 2 tabs, parent (responsavel) sees all 3 tabs

child_selector_shows_info.description: Child selector shows avatar, name and teams count
child_selector_shows_info.verified: Shows 'JS Jogador (1)' and 'JE Jogador (1)' with avatars

multiple_children_displayed.description: Multiple children can be displayed and selected
multiple_children_displayed.verified: 2 children displayed: Jogador Sub-13 and Jogador Escolares

clicking_child_filters_teams.description: Clicking a child filters to show only their teams
clicking_child_filters_teams.verified: First child shows Sub-13 team, second child shows Escolares team

team_card_shows_correct_info.description: Team cards show badge 'EQUIPA DO CLUBE', title with child name, sport, role
team_card_shows_correct_info.verified: Shows 'EQUIPA DO CLUBE' badge, 'Sub-13 (Jogador)', 'Hóquei em patins', 'Jogador'

club_card_shows_correct_info.description: Club card shows badge 'CLUBE', title, sport, 'Membro' role
club_card_shows_correct_info.verified: Shows 'CLUBE' badge, 'CRIAR-T Grupo desportivo', 'Hóquei em patins', 'Membro'

backend_guardian_children_endpoint.description: GET /guardian/children returns list of children with teams_count
backend_guardian_children_endpoint.verified: Returns 2 children with id, name, avatar_url, teams_count fields

backend_guardian_child_teams_endpoint.description: GET /guardian/children/:id/teams returns child's teams with child_role
backend_guardian_child_teams_endpoint.verified: Returns teams array with child_role field for each team

non_guardian_403.description: Non-guardian users cannot access guardian endpoints (403)

endpoints_tested: GET /api/guardian/children - returns children list for guardian
403 for non-guardian users on both endpoints

tabs_visibility.responsavel_user: 3 tabs visible (As minhas equipas, Os meus clubes, Os meus filhos)
tabs_visibility.admin_user: 2 tabs visible (As minhas equipas, Os meus clubes) - children tab hidden

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly checks user role === 'responsavel' before allowing access to guardian endpoints
Frontend correctly uses isGuardian = user?.role === 'responsavel' to conditionally render children tab
Child selector correctly shows teams_count from API response
Team filtering works by fetching child-specific teams via /guardian/children/:id/teams endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian children feature fully tested. Parent account (parent.sub13@test.com) has 2 linked children. Backend endpoints /guardian/children and /guardian/children/:id/teams work correctly. Frontend shows 3 tabs for responsavel users, child selector filters teams correctly. All 10 pytest tests pass.
